{{Missing Info}}

= Little Red Riding Hood Event =
[[File:Little Red Riding Hood Event Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Little Red Riding Hood Event]]
Jan. 26 - Feb. 08 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=52
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Little Red Riding Hood|orange}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Yesteryear Mirage|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
